name: Coeur Mining, Inc.
description: Coeur Mining, Inc. is a well-diversified, growing precious metals producer with five wholly-owned operations: the Palmarejo gold-silver complex in Mexico, the Rochester silver-gold mine in Nevada, the Kensington gold mine in Alaska, the Wharf gold mine in South Dakota, and the Silvertip silver-zinc-lead exploration project in British Columbia. In addition, the Company has interests in several precious metals exploration projects in North America.
